title: pigea aurantiaca
intro: Pigea aurantiaca, also known as the Orange Bird's Eye or Spanish Eyebright, is a plant species belonging to the family Phrymaceae. It is a flowering plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pigea aurantiaca include its ability to soothe eye irritations, reduce inflammation, and combat infections, making it a popular herbal remedy for various eye and skin conditions. Pigea aurantiaca can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal preparations for its therapeutic properties.
